summary: Completed testing of Subscription Fixes and Admin Debug Endpoints. Backend: 16/16 tests pass (100%). All features verified: coupon_code parameter in subscription creation, admin debug endpoints (user-plan, mentor-sessions), admin fix endpoints (fix-subscription, fix-mentor-bookings), plan label mapping, feedback strategy call exclusion.
critical_code_review_comments: Subscription creation with coupon_code uses Razorpay addons feature for first payment discount - coupon discount is applied as negative addon
Webhook activation now sets both 'features' AND 'plan_features' fields for proper access control (line 2264 in subscriptions.py)
Strategy call exclusion uses session_type filter with {'$nin': ['Strategy Call', 'strategy_call', 'Strategy call']} in feedback.py line 67
Admin debug/user-plan endpoint shows comprehensive plan diagnosis including has_subscription_by_plan and has_subscription_by_features checks
Plan label mapping in DashboardLayout.jsx includes basic_plan and pro_plan keys mapping to 'Basic' and 'Pro' respectively (lines 308-322)
Fix-subscription endpoint sets both features and plan_features fields (line 7148 in admin.py)
